case_title: JASPER, KAREN VS ZEMENE, MULUGETA IAMIRAT et al

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JASPER, KAREN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZEMENE, MULUGETA IAMIRAT ZEMENE, ORION T. $495.03 PRINCIPAL, $5.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.03 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

CERT MAIL TO ORION T. ZEMENE RETURNED TO SENDER UNCLAIMED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $250.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEMENE, MULUGETA IAMIRAT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $495.03 FILED BY JASPER, KAREN AS TO DEFENDANT ZEMENE, MULUGETA IAMIRAT ZEMENE, ORION T. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-10-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ZEMENE, ORION T.
